description: Redesign Settings window to macOS System Settings style with sidebar nav, add Whisper model/language/filler word settings, generate app icon programmatically, and produce a macOS .dmg installer.

userStories.title: Extend Settings types and IPC handlers
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Settings type and electron-store config extended with whisperModel, language, and enabledFillerWords so that new settings screens can persist their values.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `whisperModel: 'whisper-1' | 'whisper-large-v3-turbo'` to Settings type in src/shared/types.ts (default: 'whisper-1')
Add `language: string` to Settings type (default: 'auto')
Add `enabledFillerWords: string[]` to Settings type (default: all FILLER_WORDS from constants.ts)
Update DEFAULT_SETTINGS in src/main/config-store.ts with the three new fields
Update src/main/whisper-client.ts transcribeChunk() to pass model and language from a settings argument instead of hardcoding whisper-1 and 'en'
Update src/main/index.ts onPttRelease() to read model and language from getSettings() and pass to transcribeAudio()
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Generate app icon assets programmatically
userStories.description: As a developer, I need proper app icons so the packaged .dmg looks professional and tray icons are the correct 22×22px macOS menu bar size.
acceptanceCriteria: Create scripts/generate-icons.mjs that runs with `node scripts/generate-icons.mjs` using only the `canvas` npm devDependency
Icon design: dark navy rounded-rect background (#1a1a2e), white microphone body, subtle white waveform arcs on the right side
Script generates build/icon.icns with PNG layers at 16, 32, 64, 128, 256, 512px using the ICNS binary format (4-byte OSType + 4-byte length + PNG data per layer)
Script generates resources/tray-idle.png at 22×22px (grey mic)
Script generates resources/tray-recording.png at 22×22px (red mic)
Script generates resources/tray-processing.png at 22×22px (yellow mic)
Script generates resources/tray-error.png at 22×22px (orange mic)
Add `canvas` to devDependencies in package.json
Add `"prebuild": "node scripts/generate-icons.mjs"` to package.json scripts
Script runs without error: `node scripts/generate-icons.mjs`

userStories.title: Settings window sidebar navigation shell
userStories.description: As a user, I want a settings window that looks like macOS System Settings with a sidebar and content panel so it feels native and familiar.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings window is 700×480px, non-resizable
Left sidebar is 200px wide with a slightly darker background (#1a1a1a) vs content area (#242424)
Sidebar contains four nav items: ⚙️ General, 🎙️ Transcription, ✂️ Text Cleanup, ℹ️ About
Selected nav item has a rounded blue pill highlight (#2563eb, 6px border-radius)
Right content panel shows only the selected section — others are hidden with display:none
Default selected section is General
Nav item click switches the visible section without any page reload
Section titles appear as large headings (18px, bold, white) at the top of each content panel
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: General settings section
userStories.description: As a user, I want to configure my PTT hotkey, HUD position, and auto-start from the General section.
acceptanceCriteria: General section shows three settings rows, each with a label on the left and control on the right

PTT Hotkey row: shows current hotkey in a grey pill badge; an 'Edit' button enters capture mode showing 'Press your hotkey…'; pressing any modifier combo captures it and calls rebindHotkey IPC; pressing Escape cancels
HUD Position row: segmented control with 'Top' and 'Bottom' options; selected option is highlighted blue; calls setSetting('hudPosition', ...) on change
Launch at Login row: toggle switch; reflects current autoStart setting; calls setLoginItem IPC on change
All controls load their initial values from getSettings() on page load
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Transcription settings section
userStories.description: As a user, I want to set my OpenAI API key, Whisper model, and transcription language from one section.
acceptanceCriteria: API Key row: password input masked with dots; Save button; on save calls setApiKey IPC and shows 'Saved ✓' in green for 2s; if key already exists shows '●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●' placeholder; clicking input clears placeholder so user can type new key
Model row: native <select> dropdown with options 'whisper-1 (default)' and 'whisper-large-v3-turbo (faster)'; saves via setSetting('whisperModel', ...) on change

Language row: native <select> dropdown with options: Auto-detect (value: 'auto'), English (en), Spanish (es), French (fr), German (de), Portuguese (pt), Japanese (ja), Chinese (zh); saves via setSetting('language', ...) on change
All controls load initial values from getSettings() on page load
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Text Cleanup settings section
userStories.description: As a user, I want to toggle filler word removal on/off and control which preset words are removed.
acceptanceCriteria: Master toggle row at the top: 'Remove filler words' label + toggle switch; maps to fillerWordRemoval setting
Below master toggle: a grid (3 columns) of individual word chips for each word in FILLER_WORDS constant: um, uh, umm, uhh, hmm, like, you know, basically, literally, actually, right
Each chip is a pill button showing the word; active chips have blue background (#2563eb), inactive chips have grey background (#3a3a3a)
Clicking a chip toggles it and saves the updated enabledFillerWords array via setSetting('enabledFillerWords', [...])
When master toggle is off, the entire word grid has opacity: 0.4 and pointer-events: none
Initial chip states reflect which words are in the enabledFillerWords setting array
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: About settings section
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the app version and useful info in an About screen.
acceptanceCriteria: About section shows the app icon image (resources/tray-idle.png) at 64×64px centered
Shows 'WhisprAtHome' as large title (22px bold)
Shows version string read from package.json (hardcode the value from package.json — no need for IPC)
Shows 'Whisper API pricing: $0.006 / min' as a dimmed helper line
'Check for updates' button styled as secondary button; clicking it logs 'Check for updates clicked' to console (no-op placeholder)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: macOS DMG packaging via electron-builder
userStories.description: As a developer, I want `npm run make` to produce a working unsigned .dmg installer for macOS.
acceptanceCriteria: electron-builder.config.ts sets `mac.identity` to `null` (skip code signing)
electron-builder.config.ts targets `['dmg']` for mac with arch `['arm64', 'x64']`
asarUnpack includes: `**/node_modules/uiohook-napi/**`, `**/node_modules/keytar/**`, `**/node_modules/@nut-tree-fork/**`, `**/node_modules/node-record-lpcm16/**`
`npm run make` script in package.json is: `npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.ts`
`npm run make` completes without fatal error on macOS
Output .dmg file exists in dist/ folder after running make
Typecheck passes
